docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $190.00 FILED BY MOLINA DOLORES AS TO DEFENDANT MAHAN TOM ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-15-1992 AT 07:00 PM IN DEPT 01
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT MAHAN TOM
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION JUN-15-1992, CONTINUANCE ORDERED PER REQUEST TO JUL-20-1992 AT 07:00 PM IN DEPT 01

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MOLINA DOLORES RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MAHAN TOM $190.00 PRINCIPAL, $8.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $198.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
NOTICE OF JUDGMENT TO TOM MAHAN, NOT AT THIS ADDRESS.
NOTICE OF CONTINUANCE TO DEFEND. RETURNED, NOT AT THIS ADDRESS.
